---
title: "Teaching"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(
               cache.path = "cache/",
               cache = FALSE,
               echo = FALSE, #set to false to hide code
               message = FALSE,
               warning = FALSE,
               out.width = "100%",
               dpi = 200,
               fig.align = "center")  
```

<div style="text-align: center;">
  <ul style="display: inline-block; text-align: left; margin: 0; padding-left: 1.2em;">
    <li>Social Protection – BSc Economics (<em>in French</em>)</li>
    Paris 1 Panthéon Sorbonne (<em>2025-26</em>)
  </ul>
</div>
